tools.name: create_or_update_file
tools.description: Create or update a single file in a GitHub repository. Requires the file path, content (as a string), a commit message, and the branch name. If updating, include the SHA of the file being replaced.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path where to create/update the file

parameters.name: branch
parameters.description: Branch to create/update the file in

parameters.name: sha
parameters.description: SHA of the file being replaced (required when updating)

tools.name: search_repositories
tools.description: Search for GitHub repositories matching a query string. Returns repository names, descriptions, URLs, star counts, and language information.

parameters.name: perPage
parameters.description: Number of results per page (default: 30, max: 100)

tools.name: create_repository
tools.description: Create a new GitHub repository in your account.

parameters.name: private
parameters.description: Whether the repository should be private

tools.name: get_file_contents
tools.description: Get the contents of a file or directory from a GitHub repository. Returns file content for files and a list of entries for directories.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path to the file or directory

tools.name: push_files
tools.description: Push multiple files to a GitHub repository in a single commit. Creates or updates multiple files at once.

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: Array of files to push, each with path and content

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue in a GitHub repository.

tools.name: create_pull_request
tools.description: Create a new pull request in a GitHub repository.

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Search for code across GitHub repositories. Returns matching code snippets with file paths and repository information.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query using GitHub code search syntax

tools.name: search_issues
tools.description: Search for issues and pull requests across GitHub repositories.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query using GitHub issues search syntax

tools.name: list_issues
tools.description: List issues in a GitHub repository with filtering options.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filter by state: open, closed, or all

tools.name: create_branch
tools.description: Create a new branch in a GitHub repository from a specified source branch or commit SHA.

parameters.name: from_branch
parameters.description: Source branch name (defaults to repo default branch)

tools.name: list_commits
tools.description: Get list of commits of a branch in a GitHub repository.
